name: Compact Microwave 17L Single-Function (Iris Ohyama)
pros: Trusted Iris Ohyama brand with 302 reviews and solid 4.32★ rating — reliable build quality
Compact 17L footprint fits tight Japanese kitchens; turntable design widely compatible
Multi-power options (200W/500W/650W) provide basic flexibility for defrosting and reheating
cons: Single-function design lacks auto-menu presets — requires manual time and power entry
Turntable style takes more counter space than flat-table competitors
shortDescription: Reliable compact microwave from trusted Iris Ohyama brand for small spaces.
review: Iris Ohyama delivers dependable, uninspiring functionality at a fair price. This microwave does one job well: heat things. The multiple power settings offer slightly more control than budget alternatives, and the brand's warranty service is easier to navigate in Japan than no-name competitors. A safe choice for renters who want reliability over features.
